zh.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy是Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen和unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy的女兒，於大約0980年出生在法國豪-諾門迪。她於1004年之後與Gilbert I de Saint Valery在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1055年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考享年77歲，埋葬在法國奧德考-吉索澤斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy是Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen和unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy的女儿，于大约0980年出生在法国豪-諾門迪。她于1004年之后与Gilbert I de Saint Valery在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1055年在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考享年77岁，埋葬在法国奧德考-吉索澤斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Normandin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

nameMeanings.name: Papia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Sicily): from the Greek personal name Papias, derived from pappias ‘daddy’. Alternatively, from the Greek surname Papias, derived from the medieval Greek occupational name papias ‘guard of the Imperial Palace’.

en.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy was born about 0980, in Upper Normandy, France as the daughter of Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen and unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. She married Gilbert I de Saint Valery after 1004, in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1055, in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy est née environ 0980, à Haute-Normandie, France, fille de Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen et unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. Elle a épousé Gilbert I de Saint Valery après 1004, à Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1055, à Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, France.

de.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy wurde um 0980 in Haute-Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen und unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy geboren. Sie hat nach 1004 in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Gilbert I de Saint Valery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1055 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, Frankreich begraben.

ht.Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy è nata il circa 0980 nel Haute-Normandie, Francia come figlia di Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen e unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. Lei sposato Gilbert I de Saint Valery dopo il 1004, nel Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1055, nel Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandyは約0980年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディでRichard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouenとunknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandyの娘として生まれた。1004年以後にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックスでGilbert I de Saint Valeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1055年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックスで77歳で死去し，フランスアウドカウクス-エト-サウズエンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy(은)는 대략 0980년 프랑스 하테-노먼디에서 Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen(와)과 unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1004년 이후 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-발e리--카스에서 Gilbert I de Saint Valery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1055년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-발e리--카스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오드 카스-트-소즌스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy nasceu aproximadamente 0980, em Haute-Normandie, França filha de Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen e unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. Ela casou-se com Gilbert I de Saint Valery após 1004, em Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1055, em Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy родилась около 0980 г. в местности хауте-норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen и unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert I de Saint Valery после 1004 г. в местности сеинт-валeри-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1055 г. в местности сеинт-валeри-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности каукс-ет-саузенс, ауд, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Papia de Normandy nació aproximadamente 0980, en Haute-Normandie, Francia como hija de Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen y unknown mistresses of Richard I of Normandy. Se casó con Gilbert I de Saint Valery después de 1004, en Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1055, en Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Caux-et-Sauzens, Aude, Francia.
